name: jwlearn
description: Intelligent learning tool for medical exam preparation with PDF parsing, question bank management, smart exam generation and spaced repetition review
author: jw

commands.name: parse
commands.description: Parse a document, extract structured knowledge points, and optionally add to review deck

parameters.name: input
parameters.description: Path to the input document (markdown/txt/pdf/docx)

parameters.name: auto-add
parameters.description: Automatically add extracted knowledge points to review deck

parameters.name: output
parameters.description: Optional output path to save parsed results

commands.name: convert
commands.description: Convert document between different formats (PDF→MD/TXT, MD/TXT→JSON)

parameters.name: input
parameters.description: Path to source file

parameters.name: output
parameters.description: Path to output file (format inferred from extension: .md, .txt, .json)

commands.name: review
commands.description: Start an FSRS-based spaced repetition review session

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of cards to review (default: 20)

commands.name: stats
commands.description: Display comprehensive learning statistics and progress

commands.name: qa
commands.description: Ask questions about your knowledge base

parameters.name: question
parameters.description: The question to answer

parameters.name: document
parameters.description: Optional document name/ID to limit search scope

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Generate practice exercises from knowledge base

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Document name/ID to generate questions from

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of questions to generate (default: 5)

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Question type: multiple-choice, true-false, short-answer, all (default: all)

parameters.name: keyword
parameters.description: Search keyword

parameters.name: document
parameters.description: Optional document ID to limit search scope

commands.name: chapters
commands.description: List all chapters of a document

parameters.name: document
parameters.description: Document ID

commands.name: cross-chapter
commands.description: Get cross-chapter comparative insights for a document

parameters.name: document
parameters.description: Document ID

commands.name: bank-import
commands.description: Import PDF question bank, auto-extract chapters, questions, answers and associate with knowledge points

parameters.name: input
parameters.description: Path to the PDF question bank file

parameters.name: subject
parameters.description: Subject/course name for the question bank

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Optional custom title for the question bank

parameters.name: answer-page
parameters.description: Page number where answers start (for separate answer section)

commands.name: bank-list
commands.description: Browse all question banks and their chapter structures

parameters.name: bank-id
parameters.description: Optional specific bank ID to view detailed chapter structure

commands.name: bank-extract
commands.description: Extract questions by multiple dimensions: chapter, knowledge point, question type, difficulty

parameters.name: bank-id
parameters.description: Question bank ID to extract from

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of questions to extract (default: 10)

parameters.name: chapter
parameters.description: Optional chapter ID/name to filter by

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Optional question type to filter by: single_choice, multiple_choice, true_false, short_answer, essay

parameters.name: difficulty
parameters.description: Optional difficulty level to filter by (1-5)

parameters.name: knowledge-point
parameters.description: Optional knowledge point ID/keyword to filter by

parameters.name: random
parameters.description: Whether to randomize question order (default: true)

parameters.name: output
parameters.description: Optional output path to save extracted questions

commands.name: exam-generate
commands.description: Automatically generate exam paper with difficulty control, knowledge point coverage, and question type ratio

parameters.name: bank-ids
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of question bank IDs to use

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Exam paper title

parameters.name: total-score
parameters.description: Total score of the exam (default: 100)

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: Exam duration in minutes (default: 120)

parameters.name: difficulty-distribution
parameters.description: Difficulty distribution as comma-separated values (easy:medium:hard, e.g., 3:5:2)

parameters.name: type-ratio
parameters.description: Question type ratio as comma-separated key:value pairs (e.g., single_choice:40,multiple_choice:30,true_false:10,short_answer:20)

parameters.name: knowledge-coverage
parameters.description: Minimum knowledge point coverage rate (0-1, default: 0.8)

parameters.name: output
parameters.description: Output path for the generated exam paper (supports .md or .pdf)

commands.name: wrongbook
commands.description: Wrong question book management: browse, review, export, clear

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Action to perform: list, review, export, clear, mark-mastered

parameters.name: bank-id
parameters.description: Optional filter by question bank ID

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of questions to review (default: 20)

parameters.name: output
parameters.description: Output path for export action

parameters.name: question-id
parameters.description: Question ID for mark-mastered action
